emails.subject: Conflict Check
emails.body: Conflict Check Kay, Please see attached. If you could let me know ASAP I would appreciate it.

emails.subject: Conflict Check
emails.body: Conflict Check Kay, Please see attached. If you could let me know ASAP I would appreciate it.

emails.subject: Re: Conflict Check
emails.body: Re: Conflict Check Gerald Sorry for the delay. ENA has an executed agreement with Entergy for the Everest II re Possible sale to Entergy of certain of ENA's power generation assets in consideration for, amongst other things, the conveyance to Ena of the restructuring rights to Entergy's interests in the Bellingham, Sayerville and Cherokee projects owned by FPL Energy, L.L.C. It is bilateral and expires August 11, 2001 Kay C. Young Legal Specialist Enron North America Corp. 713-853-6794 Phone 713-646-3393 Fax kay.young@enron.com Gerald Nemec 03/12/2001 09:39 AM
